heuristics.title: Stale-wave remediation residue
heuristics.classifier: queue_stale_wave_auto_remediation_failed is set while active stale-wave signal is false

bands.label: critical
bands.definition: Noise is misclassified as signal or true signal is suppressed.

bands.label: weak
bands.definition: Noise is still visible in primary stream and signal remains hard to see.

bands.label: mixed
bands.definition: Suppression is partial; signal/noise separation is inconsistent.

bands.label: good
bands.definition: Noise is mostly suppressed and signal is surfaced with rationale.

bands.label: excellent
bands.definition: Noise suppression is robust and forensic visibility remains complete.

suppression_policy.notes: Suppress low-signal items from primary stream while retaining audit evidence.

provenance.notes: Template skeleton for reusable LT-01 heuristic packs.
